name: com.ultraleap.tracking.preview
description: Ultraleap Tracking Preview, contains code and examples for interactions that are in a preview state and subject to potential breaking changes

samples.description: Shared example assets required for all other Ultraleap Tracking Preview Sample content.
A collection of examples for the Ultraleap Tracking Preview package, which use the Input System Package (New)
A collection of examples for the Ultraleap Tracking Preview package which require the Unity Input Manager (Old).
